data.title: REAL Shows Network has launched "Nashville Next Door" series, showcasing real estate and lifestyle in Nashville, TN.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on January 21, 2026, REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the introduction of "Nashville Next Door," a newly launched series on the national TV platform. This show, hosted by prominent figures in the local real estate industry, aims to showcase real estate and lifestyle narratives. The program will be locally produced in Nashville and will be part of RSN's lineup, highlighting the city's unique offerings.

data.title: REAL Shows Network adds Selling Big Island - Hawaii TV series, showcasing Hawaii's Big Island, to lineup.
data.description: A new locally hosted series called Selling Big Island - Hawaii has been added to the lineup of REAL Shows Network (RSN), a national TV platform. This series focuses on showcasing real estate and lifestyle on Hawaii's Big Island. The show is hosted by a resident real estate expert and is aimed at highlighting the unique properties and experiences available in the region. The addition of this series expands RSN's offerings and provides viewers with insights into the real estate market on the Big Island.

data.title: REAL Shows Network launched Living the Dream TV series in Columbus, OH, focusing on real estate and lifestyle, hosted by local real estate leader Justin. Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on January 21, 2026, the REAL Shows Network (RSN) debuted Living the Dream, a new TV series dedicated to real estate and lifestyle content. The show, hosted by local real estate expert Justin, has now become part of the network's lineup. This addition aims to enhance the viewing experience for RSN's audience with a focus on showcasing the local market in Columbus.

data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton beats earnings, raises EPS outlook. Voyager surges on ISS deal. Defense stocks rise.
data.description: Booz Allen Hamilton surpasses earnings expectations and is described as "finding its stride again" as it raises its EPS forecast. Voyager experiences a significant rise following a partnership announcement for missions to the International Space Station. The increased earnings forecast and collaboration for ISS experiments result in a notable surge for two defense stocks, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Bitcoin hovers at $90,000 with other markets rising, breaking correlation with Ethereum./crypto.
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) is currently hovering at the $90,000 mark, stagnant despite the ongoing rally in global equity markets and commodities. There is a notable shift in the correlation trends within the crypto market compared to broader equities, with Ethereum (ETH) failing to mirror the movements of the Russell 2000 index, breaking a historical pattern of about 90% correlation. Analyst Kevin pointed out this divergence, emphasizing that Ethereum and the Russell 2000 traditionally moved together, especially during risk-on scenarios. This shift indicates a prolonged decoupling between the two assets. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Virtune AB announces 10:1 share split for Virtune Bitcoin Prime ETP (VIRBTCP) on Feb 2, 2026. No action required. NAV per share reduced by factor of ten. Total value of holdings remains unchanged.
data.description: Virtune AB (Publ) has announced a 10:1 share split of the Virtune Bitcoin Prime ETP (ticker: VIRBTCP) to improve trading liquidity and accessibility. The split will take effect on February 2, 2026, with each existing share splitting into ten new shares, reducing the NAV per share by a factor of ten. Investors do not need to take any action as their total holdings' value will not change. For example, if an investor owns 100 shares, they will have 1,000 shares post-split, with no change in total investment value. The product name and ticker will remain the same.

data.title: iRobot emerges from Chapter 11, creates subsidiary iRobot Safe focused on data protection. (Character count: 94)
data.description: A prominent consumer robotics leader, iRobot Corporation, has successfully emerged from Chapter 11 bankruptcy as a stronger company based in Boston. The company has established an independent U.S. subsidiary called iRobot Safe, focusing on data protection and governance. This development was announced on January 23, 2026, in Bedford, Massachusetts.

data.title: Eimskip's Nomination Committee aids in board succession planning, nominating candidates for the Board and its committees.
data.description: The Nomination Committee, a sub-committee of the Board of Directors, aids the Board in Board succession planning, and identifying and nominating Board candidates, alternate Board candidates, and committee members.

data.title: ATOM Group partners with Don Perry for ATOM Distribution launch in the US. Deal signed on Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE and Panama City on January 22, 2026, ATOM Group, a worldwide business entity focusing on digital platforms, content, and talent commercialization, revealed the agreement of a term sheet with Rogelio Archilla, also known as Don.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy prepares for winter weather with 3,300 electric workers and 700 gas workers staged in Southeast Texas. State declares disaster.
data.description: With around 3,300 CenterPoint electric staff and contractors positioned for storm readiness and potential restoration tasks in Southeast Texas, alongside about 700 natural gas workers and contractors aiding in the response, the State of Texas has declared a disaster.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers of fire and CO risks in winter; crucial tips for using generators, furnaces, and heaters.
data.description: In response to an upcoming winter storm in the United States, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has cautioned consumers about the dangers of fires and carbon monoxide (CO) poisoning. With temperatures decreasing, there is heightened concern for safety as many prepare for the severe weather. The CPSC emphasizes the importance of preventative measures to avoid incidents related to fires and CO poisoning during this time.

data.title: BW LPG Limited, registered in Singapore and listed on OSE and NYSE, granted waiver from Singapore Code on Takeovers, subject to U.S. and Norwegian rules.
data.description: Singapore-based BW LPG Limited, registered and listed on Euronext Oslo Børs and the New York Stock Exchange, falls under the jurisdiction of Singapore, U.S., and Norwegian takeover regulations. The company, with OSE ticker code "BWLPG" and NYSE ticker code "BWLP," has received an exemption from the Singapore Code on Takeovers and Mergers. Consequently, BW LPG is currently subject to U.S. and Norwegian regulations.
